en: Set the trumpet to your lips!One like a vulture is over the house of the LORD, because they have transgressed my covenant and rebelled against my law.
zh: “你要把號角放在你的嘴上， 敵人如鷹一般來攻擊耶和華的家； 因為他們違背了我的約， 干犯了我的律法。

en: To me they cry, My God, we- Israel- know you.
zh: 他們必向我哀求： ‘我的 神啊！我們以色列認識你。’

en: Israel has spurned the good; the enemy shall pursue him.
zh: 以色列棄絕了良善， 所以仇敵必追趕他。

en: They made kings, but not through me. They set up princes, but I knew it not. With their silver and gold they made idols for their own destruction.
zh: “他們立了君王，卻不是出於我； 他們立了首領，我卻不知道。 他們用自己的金銀為自己做了偶像， 以致他們被剪除。

en: I have spurned your calf, O Samaria. My anger burns against them. How long will they be incapable of innocence?
zh: 撒瑪利亞啊！我要除掉你的牛犢， 我的怒氣要向撒瑪利亞人發作， 他們要到幾時才能無罪免罰呢？

en: For it is from Israel; a craftsman made it; it is not God. The calf of Samaria shall be broken to pieces.
zh: 這牛犢是出於以色列， 是匠人所做的，它並不是神， 撒瑪利亞的牛犢必被粉碎。

en: For they sow the wind, and they shall reap the whirlwind. The standing grain has no heads; it shall yield no flour; if it were to yield, strangers would devour it.
zh: 他們播種的是風， 收成的是暴風。 生出來的苗沒有麥穗， 不能做成麵粉； 即或做成麵粉，也必被別國的人吞吃。

en: Israel is swallowed up; already they are among the nations as a useless vessel.
zh: 以色列被吞吃， 如今在萬國中， 好像沒有人喜悅的器皿。

en: For they have gone up to Assyria, a wild donkey wandering alone; Ephraim has hired lovers.
zh: 他們上去投奔亞述， 像一隻獨行的野驢， 以法蓮賄買愛人。

en: Though they hire allies among the nations, I will soon gather them up. And the king and princes shall soon writhe because of the tribute.
zh: 他們雖然在列國中賄買人， 我現在卻要招聚他們。 他們因著君王和領袖所加的重擔， 逐漸衰微。

en: Because Ephraim has multiplied altars for sinning, they have become to him altars for sinning.
zh: 以法蓮增添好些祭壇去犯罪， 這些就成了他們犯罪的祭壇。

en: Were I to write for him my laws by the ten thousands, they would be regarded as a strange thing.
zh: 我雖然為他們寫了律法萬條， 他們卻看作是為外族人寫的，與他們毫無關係一般。

en: As for my sacrificial offerings, they sacrifice meat and eat it, but the LORD does not accept them. Now he will remember their iniquity and punish their sins; they shall return to Egypt.
zh: 他們喜愛獻祭， 獻肉為祭，又拿來吃； 耶和華卻不喜悅他們。 他必記得他們的罪孽， 追討他們的罪惡； 他們必回到埃及去。

en: For Israel has forgotten his Maker and built palaces, and Judah has multiplied fortified cities; so I will send a fire upon his cities, and it shall devour her strongholds.
zh: 以色列忘記了造他的主，建造了很多宮殿； 猶大也增添了很多堅固城。 我卻要降火在他的眾城中，吞滅他的堡壘。”
